raw_response_text:
<features>
- animal type: dog
- fur color: black and tan/brown
- fur texture: shaggy/long
- ear shape: small, pointed, partially covered by fur
- snout: short
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = black and tan/brown AND fur texture = shaggy/long] THEN [36]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = cream/white with dark brown/black points AND eye color = blue] THEN [6]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 36 fires because the Query Image shows an animal that is clearly a dog, with black and tan/brown shaggy/long fur, which matches the observable features of the examples for class 36.
</rule_check>
<response>36</response>

<features>
- animal type: cat
- fur color: white/cream body with dark brown/black points (face, ears)
- eye color: blue
- fur length: long
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = black and tan/brown AND fur length = medium to long] THEN [36]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = white/cream body with dark points AND eye color = blue AND fur length = long] THEN [6]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 6 fires because the query image shows a cat with a white/cream body and dark points on its face and ears, blue eyes, and long fur, which matches the observable features for class 6.
</rule_check>
<response>6</response>
